If you are staring at the Post Office from Jefferson, head down the side-street to your right, hugging the P.O. building. There is an amazing apple tree with giant apples growing between the building and the road! Falling Fruit season: July-September.

Old pear tree standing alone in the middle of an open field on Truman State's campus, notable for its hollow trunk. Plenty of pears on the tree in June 2025.
